purpose: Technical-first B1-B10 resolution program. Downstream translation is deferred until technical gates pass.

directions.technical_solution_target: Compiler method that reduces routed two-qubit work and exposure across external benchmarks while emitting replayable semantic certificates.
directions.current_evidence: 30/30 circuits; 481 virtual SWAPs removed; 37.18% 2Q reduction; 481/481 proof replay; post-virtual-SWAP 1Q resynthesis gives 1.018x logical T-count proxy; native Z-phase canonicalization gives a further 1.000990x; targeted control-RZ commuting removes 380 RZ gates and gives 1.119x logical T-count proxy over the native pass; U3 phase factoring now factors 1641 U3 gates, removes 313 additional RZ gates after factoring, emits 1641 factorization certificate events plus 3242 RZ-commute certificate events, passes 30/30 Aer cross-checks, and gives a further 1.036371x logical T-count proxy over control-RZ. T-B1-004a exposes 270 arbitrary decimal rotations and 3 target cone classes; T-B1-004b shows cone_01 has 35 pair-local single-arbitrary windows; T-B1-004c gets 0 exact-pass windows for same-envelope phase removal; T-B1-004d lets neighboring RZ phases reabsorb while locking RY to 9 exact candidates and still gets 0 exact-pass windows, best/median residual 0.21253656711362606 / 0.3643516233170531; T-B1-004e finds all 35 cone_01 windows have nonzero RY parameter sensitivity, 0 are near the pi/4 exact grid, and the windows use 4 distinct theta groups; T-B1-004f records 31 duplicate theta occurrences and an optimistic 620 proxy-T cache-reuse signal, but the occurrence ledger still counts 0 removed occurrences and 0 proxy-T reduction; T-B1-004g checked the physical theta-sharing cost-model route at 0/8 gates; T-B1-004h defines 4 shared-theta synthesis object proposals covering all 35 windows; T-B1-004i replay-verifies 4/4 objects and 35/35 occurrences against source QASM and parameter-transfer groups with 0 mismatches, so the updated cost-model gate passes 2/8 gates (CM-02 object existence plus CM-03 replay) and fails 6/8, with accepted B7 ledger reduction still 0.
directions.main_blocker: No calibrated/live-like heavy-hex baseline; dynamic-circuit/reset/classical-control gaps; FT synthesis ledger re-costs sat_n11 as exact Clifford+T rotations and moves it to data-path dominance under parallel factories, but the new B7 min-STV boundary is gcm_h6 at 1.086008x; target and cone-feasibility gates now isolate cone_01, same-envelope phase/Euler absorption routes are closed, and theta cache sharing is not counted as an FT resource delta, and the proposed physical cost model now has shared object proposals and line-level replay verification but still lacks occurrence-removing certificates, layout, factory, error-budget, independent-baseline, and refreshed-ledger evidence. There is still no rewrite, no semantic certificate, no obstruction theorem, and no resource reduction.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B1-004: synthesize or prove a broader local two-qubit semantic rewrite, KAK/Clifford scaffold, or alternate certificate-bearing transformation for at least 30 cone_01 windows while explicitly carrying, sharing, or eliminating theta with replayable certificates; reduce the arbitrary-rotation ledger by at least 30 occurrences or 600 proxy-T units under the occurrence ledger, or satisfy CM-01 plus CM-04 through CM-08 for a physical theta-sharing cost model, starting with layout/routing for the replay-verified shared-theta objects, then re-run B7.

directions.technical_solution_target: Code/schedule/decoder comparison that beats surface-code target volume under the same confidence-bounded metric.
directions.current_evidence: Stim/PyMatching baseline; closed reduced-round artifact boundary; T-B2-003 leakage-flagged analytic boundary; T-B2-004 Stim HERALDED_ERASE / DEPOLARIZE1 stress; T-B2-005 false-positive overhead stress; T-B2-006 posterior-calibrated shot-conditioned leakage boundary; T-B2-007 posterior-weighted decoder-risk ledger; T-B2-008 decoder-input contract feasibility gate; T-B2-009a per-shot decoder trace packet; T-B2-009b posterior-likelihood injection gate; T-B2-009c DEM-informed detector-to-edge semantics gate; and T-B2-009d hardware-like leakage observation model gate. The latest gate consumes 3 strict challenge rows across 3 observation profiles / 1728 profile-shots with 864 holdout profile-shots. The best conservative hardware-like profile changes 0 predictions, fixes 0 failures, introduces 0 failures, leaves 22 injected failures, and has holdout failure delta 0; the stress profile generates 727 model flag events but still fixes 0 failures. Holdout improvement remains false and route demotion remains recommended.
directions.main_blocker: The reduced-round lever remains closed as a small-distance/aggressive artifact. The heralded-erasure route now has per-shot traces, synthetic posterior-weight injection, DEM-informed edge semantics, and a detector-bitstring-driven hardware-like leakage observation model, but none improves failures. The model is still not calibrated, not hardware-derived, and not a production decoder. The route still lacks real calibrated leakage/flag observations, independent hardware traces, and distance-scaling runtime/threshold curves under calibrated posterior injection.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B2-009e: replace the hardware-like observation model with real calibrated leakage/flag observations or independently supplied hardware traces, then require holdout improvement plus all-challenge non-regression before feeding B7.
directions.next_technical_experiment: Run T-B2-009e: replace the hardware-like observation model with real calibrated leakage/flag observations or independently supplied hardware traces, then require holdout improvement plus all-challenge non-regression before feeding B7.

directions.technical_solution_target: Reaction-coordinate quantum resource estimate tied to observable error and classical baselines.
directions.current_evidence: PySCF small-molecule proxy plus B10-T1 reaction-coordinate denominators; B3 artifacts now run through T-B3-011. T-B3-011 covers H2/LiH/H2O/N2 with bounded high-coefficient sampled UCC/ADAPT pressure: 35 sampled groups total, 384 shots/group, mean/max relative variance error 0.0833/0.5029, max optimizer-loop shots lower bound 475,043,013,690,000, max optimizer-loop 2Q lower bound 281,225,464,104,480,000, and selected-CI larger-basis denominator wins remain 0.
directions.main_blocker: The current one-parameter UCC/ADAPT plus QWC route is demoted: it lacks converged multi-parameter chemistry, full compiled covariance, all-group sampling, and any advantage win, while optimizer-loop lower bounds are prohibitive.
directions.next_experiment: Keep B3 as a negative-boundary track unless T-B3-012 produces real multi-parameter UCCSD/ADAPT covariance or stronger-than-QWC measurement that beats selected-CI/DMRG/tensor denominators after optimizer-loop accounting.

directions.technical_solution_target: Circuit-level verifiable advantage task with explicit completeness/soundness against adaptive spoofers.
directions.current_evidence: Toy hidden-trap protocol rejects four spoofing families; shared B4/B8 CNOT hidden-projection refresh task runs 3 circuit-derived tasks / 192 configs with honest completeness 1.0, no-refresh high-leakage max soundness 0.675, and repaired high-leakage max soundness 0.0. T-B4-002a exports 36 OpenQASM 3 randomized-measurement verifier circuits with max 30 qubits including verifier ancillas and 0 Qiskit/Aer semantic mismatches. T-B8-003a adds a public-QASM packet spoofer gate: a deterministic parser/emulator predicts all 36 public packet transcripts, so public-packet protocol soundness is rejected. T-B8-003b separates public skeletons from private masks/flips for all 36 circuits, but public data transcripts remain deterministic and classically predictable; the contract passes 4/8 gates and fails 4/8. T-B8-003c adds non-stabilizer H plus T/RZ(pi/4) challenge-basis layers to all 36 skeletons, removes the deterministic transcript blocker for 36/36 pilot circuits, and records minimum min-entropy 4 bits with maximum output probability 0.0625. T-B8-003d attacks the pilot with four support-aware spoofer families: exact transcript success remains 0.0625, but support-only verifier acceptance is 1.0, so public support membership is rejected as a soundness condition.
directions.main_blocker: The exact transcript blocker survives, but public support membership is fully spoofable. The protocol now needs verifier-private acceptance predicates, real backend properties, or hardware execution; otherwise the non-stabilizer pilot remains a public-support artifact, not soundness.
directions.next_experiment: Add verifier-private predicates or hardware/backend transcript burden beyond public support membership, then rerun learned/generative spoofer gates.

directions.technical_solution_target: Hybrid quantum-tensor/embedding solver improving accuracy-per-resource on a meaningful correlated model.
directions.current_evidence: Exact small Hubbard + cluster proxy; oracle-tuned and non-oracle response embedding denominators; exact-state-seeded MPS pressure; non-exact-state-seeded MPS/ALS; two-site finite-DMRG-style pressure; T-B5-005 canonical DMRG readiness gate; T-B5-006a canonical-environment smoke gate; and T-B5-006b same-access production contract gate on the same 9 B10 D5 Hubbard response rows. The readiness gate passes 0/8 conditions, the smoke gate passes 0/9 rows, and the production contract passes only 2/10 gates with no production DMRG, no sampling oracle, and no positive same-access route.
directions.main_blocker: The current tensor portfolio is a pressure ladder, not mature canonical-environment DMRG. Non-seeded prototypes beat seeded pressure on 0 rows; the production contract still has 5 blocking sampling requirements and no same-access quantum response kernel.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B5-006: implement mature canonical-environment DMRG/MPS with stored environments, residuals, sweep convergence, no exact-state seeding, and full cost accounting while satisfying T-B5-006b; or compare a fully costed quantum impurity/response kernel against the full D5 denominator ladder.

directions.technical_solution_target: Leakage-controlled high-Tc candidate ranking pipeline using physics descriptors, not family priors.
directions.current_evidence: Toy descriptor ranker plus T-B6-001 curated leakage audit, T-B6-002 formula-derived descriptor screen, and T-B6-003 structural/electronic proxy boundary. The latest B6 artifact keeps 38 records / 22 families / 12 expanded negative controls, replaces formula-only score with curated structural/electronic proxy channels, improves AP@12 from formula 0.10 to structural 0.611, but still loses to family-prior AP@12 1.0; post-split structural AP is 0.690 vs family-prior 0.982, family-holdout structural mean AP is 0.896, and top-12 still contains 3 negative controls. No discovery, mechanism, complete-database, DFT, crystallographic-database, or computed-observable claim.
directions.main_blocker: Structural/electronic proxy channels now beat formula-only descriptors, but family-prior leakage still dominates and negative controls remain high in the ranked list. The proxy is curated/imputed, not real crystallographic, DFT, B5-DMRG, or quantum-observable data.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B6-004: replace curated proxy channels with actual crystallographic, DFT, or B5-computed structural/electronic observables, then expand post-2008 negatives until family priors and random baselines cannot saturate.

directions.technical_solution_target: End-to-end fault-tolerant resource ledger where B1/B2 improvements survive workload DAGs, factories, layout, and feed-forward.
directions.current_evidence: B1/B2 dependency bridge: 1.195x-1.616x conservative STV reduction; workload-DAG factory schedule: mean 1.475x; original logical T-factory schedule exposed a 1.0x min-STV boundary; control-RZ commute schedule improves min STV to 1.121951x; U3 phase-factored schedule preserves min STV at 1.121951x and improves mean STV to 1.234394x; FT synthesis ledger exposes gcm_h6 as the new min row at 1.086008x; T-B7-004 through T-B7-010a show precision-aware budgets, local same-axis merge, shared cache, nonlocal adjacent cancellation, four tested w8_21 rewrite families, and one-angle retained-template routes do not produce a certified occurrence-removing saving. T-B1-004c/d now show same-envelope cone_01 phase-removal and Euler-reabsorption routes have 0 exact-pass windows; T-B1-004e shows all 35 candidate RY parameters are sensitive and none are pi/4-grid exact; T-B1-004f shows 31 duplicate theta occurrences and 620 optimistic cache-reuse proxy-T units, but the accepted occurrence ledger still counts 0 removed occurrences and 0 proxy-T reduction; T-B1-004g rejected the physical theta-sharing cost-model route at 0/8 gates; T-B1-004h adds 4 shared-theta object proposals covering all 35 windows; T-B1-004i replay-verifies 4/4 objects and 35/35 occurrences with 0 mismatches, so CM-02 and CM-03 pass and the updated cost-model gate is 2/8 passed, 6/8 failed, with B7 ledger reduction still 0.
directions.main_blocker: gcm_h6 remains factory-path dominated; cone_01 is still the concrete B1 rewrite target, but simple same-envelope routes are closed, no-carrier deletion is blocked, cache-only theta sharing is not accepted, and the physical cost-model proposal has shared object proposals and line-level replay verification but still lacks occurrence-removing certificates, layout, factory, error-budget, independent-baseline, and refreshed-ledger evidence. B7 still has no physical resource claim.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B1-004: produce a certified broader cone_01 occurrence-removing rewrite for at least 30 windows with explicit theta accounting, or satisfy CM-01 plus CM-04 through CM-08 for the shared-theta physical cost model; then re-run B7 only if a rewrite certificate or accepted cost-model certificate exists.

directions.technical_solution_target: Classical verifier whose soundness stays low under adaptive leakage through challenge refresh/projection rotation.
directions.current_evidence: Hidden-invariant verifier, adaptive leakage stress, challenge refresh/rotation repair, shared B4/B8 circuit-refresh task, T-B4-002a OpenQASM 3 packet with 36 verifier circuits and 0 Aer semantic mismatches, trained/generative spoofer stress, B10-T2 proof gate, restricted lemma, transcript/device-noise bridge, ideal/noisy Aer bridges, and backend-calibrated-style GenericBackendV2 bridge with safe calibrated honest acceptance 1.0 and adversary acceptance 0.25. T-B8-003a public-QASM packet spoofer gate predicts all 36 public packet transcripts and rejects public-packet protocol soundness. T-B8-003b late-bound contract creates 36 public skeletons that hide private masks/flips, but the deterministic public data transcript remains classically predictable; 4/8 gates pass and 4/8 fail. T-B8-003c non-stabilizer late-bound transcript pilot adds H plus T/RZ(pi/4) challenge-basis layers, removes the deterministic transcript blocker for 36/36 pilot circuits, and records minimum min-entropy 4 bits with maximum output probability 0.0625. T-B8-003d support-aware spoofer gate covers four public-support spoofer families across 36 pilot circuits: max exact transcript success stays 0.0625, but max support-only acceptance is 1.0, rejecting support-membership soundness.
directions.main_blocker: The public/private boundary and non-stabilizer entropy now remove single-transcript prediction, but support-only verification is completely spoofable. Soundness still requires verifier-private predicates, real backend properties, hardware execution, or another non-public acceptance burden.
directions.next_experiment: Build a verifier-private predicate challenge or real-backend/hardware verifier bridge, then attack the resulting transcript with stronger learned/generative spoofers.

directions.technical_solution_target: Formal restricted theorem or negative lemma about gap amplification/local-Hamiltonian hardness.
directions.current_evidence: 18-instance gap lab; 9 locality-preserving candidates; 0 accepted local candidates; finite-instance failed gap-amplification negative lemma with 4 strict width-trap counterexamples, 9 dense locality traps, and 5 proof obligations; Lean-style symbolic skeleton with 5 definitions, 3 theorem skeletons, and the same 5 open obligations; named-family cluster_stabilizer_open_uniform_reweight skeleton for n=4,5,6 showing all terms uniformly scaled by 1.35, max locality preserved at 3, raw gap amplified, normalized gap invariant, and the certificate rejected as global energy rescaling; local parametric certificate checker for n >= 4 formulas with exact scale 27/20, support set {2,3}, max locality 3, finite rows n=4,5,6, and normalized-gap invariance checked by a repo-local verifier.
directions.main_blocker: The named-family statement now has a local executable verifier, but it is still not proof-assistant checked over all n; the current PATH `lean` command failed and is not a usable Lean/mathlib theorem-prover environment here. It is not a Quantum PCP proof, NLTS theorem, local-Hamiltonian hardness theorem, or global gap-amplification impossibility result.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B9-004: create a real Lean/mathlib or equivalent independently proof-checkable project and formalize support-size, uniform-scaling, spectral-width, and normalized-gap invariance lemmas for the open-boundary cluster-stabilizer family for all n >= 4.

directions.technical_solution_target: Formal theorem targets separating robust BQP advantage from fragile input/oracle/verification assumptions.
directions.current_evidence: B10-T1 includes explicit-I/O accounting, denominator notes/tables, B3/B5 denominator boundary comparison, missing-assumption and access-contract notes, B5 same-access bridge, response-sampler cost stress, B5 canonical DMRG readiness, B5 canonical-environment smoke gate, and T-B5-006b same-access production contract gate. The contract passes only 2/10 gates and preserves no-production-DMRG, no-sampling-oracle, no-positive-route, no-advantage, and no-BQP-separation boundaries.
directions.main_blocker: B10-T1 remains a concrete B5 access-model blocker: no mature canonical DMRG/MPS denominator, no response sampling oracle with variance/preparation costs, no same-access positive route, and no quantum response kernel beating the full denominator ladder.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B10-014 with T-B5-006: replace the contract/cost/smoke-gate negative boundary with mature production DMRG/MPS or a real same-access response oracle with state-preparation, mixing, measurement, confidence, optimizer-loop, and classical-denominator costs.
directions.next_technical_experiment: Run T-B10-014 with T-B5-006: implement mature canonical-environment production DMRG/MPS for the same B5 Hubbard response rows, or construct a real same-access response oracle with state-preparation, mixing, measurement, confidence, optimizer-loop, and classical denominator costs that beats the full ladder; keep T-B10-009 for real backend verifier evidence.

downstream_translation_rule: No direction moves into publication, patent, financing, or productization as an active deliverable until it passes its technical gate.
